assertion_results.text: Review identifies the N+1 query pattern as a performance issue with high or critical severity
assertion_results.evidence: Finding with severity 'high' and category 'performance' for N+1 pattern

assertion_results.text: Review explains that the nested loops cause multiplicative database queries (e.g., for N orders with M items each, this runs 1 + N + N*M + N queries)
assertion_results.evidence: States 'For N orders with M items each, this executes 1 + N + (N * M) + N queries. With 50 orders averaging 3 items each, that's 251 database queries'

assertion_results.text: Review suggests using JOINs or batch queries as a fix for the N+1 pattern
assertion_results.evidence: Provides complete JOIN query with LEFT JOINs across all four tables

assertion_results.text: Review identifies missing error handling (no try-catch around async database operations)
assertion_results.evidence: Finding titled 'Missing error handling for async database operations' with try-catch code

assertion_results.text: Review identifies missing input validation on req.params.userId
assertion_results.evidence: Finding titled 'Missing input validation on userId parameter' with parseInt validation code

assertion_results.text: Each finding includes a severity level (critical, high, medium, low, or info)
assertion_results.evidence: All 4 findings have severity levels: 2 high, 1 medium, 1 low

assertion_results.text: Each finding includes a specific fix suggestion showing code or approach
assertion_results.evidence: All findings include code diffs with specific implementations

assertion_results.text: Review includes a summary section with overall assessment
assertion_results.evidence: Review starts with 'Code Review Summary' with Overall Assessment: NEEDS CHANGES
